---
title: "YOUR TITLE GOES HERE"
---

.I am Shubh Goyal, a student at Baruch College. My expected graduation date is December 2025, and my field of employment is Data Analyst. I love playing badminton, watching web series, and exploring new places.

My Resume : <file:///C:/Users/goyal/OneDrive/Desktop/Shubh%20Goya2.pdf>
